name: tooruba
description: Configurable command buttons in a bottom panel for VS Code.

toorubaPanel.debugDefault.markdownDescription: Uses the built-in default button set for debugging when set to `true`.

default.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 16 16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M4 1.75h5.1L12.25 4.9V14.25H4z' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M9 1.75v3.5h3.25' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M10.75 2.4l.55-1.15M12.6 4.25l1.15-.55M12.65 2.8l.95-.95' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.25' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

<svg viewBox='0 0 16 16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='7' cy='7' r='4.25' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><path d='M10.5 10.5L14 14' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

toorubaPanel.items.markdownDescription: Items shown in the command panel. Each item can render `text`, `svg`, or both, and dispatch any VS Code command.

command.description: VS Code command ID to execute when the item is clicked.

text.description: Visible text label rendered inside the button. Required when `svg` is omitted.

svg.description: Inline SVG markup rendered inside the button. Required when `text` is omitted.
